# Copilot instructions

This repository uses structured agent context. Start at [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).

For new projects: run [docs/onboarding-interview.md](../docs/onboarding-interview.md) when placeholders exist; use [PROMPT.md](../PROMPT.md) as the user entry point.

For existing code: read [docs/project-context.md](../docs/project-context.md) and [docs/conventions.md](../docs/conventions.md).

Security and collaboration rules match [.cursor/rules/](../.cursor/rules/).
